chunks.text: ,\ ORDER-SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA. C.P.No.D-734 of 2018. Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge FRES H CASE. 1. For orders on office objection-A. 2. For orders on MA No.755 of 2018. E/A 3. For orders on maintaina bility. 06.03.2018. Mr. Faiz Muhammad Larik Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri Additional Advocate General This petition has been filed with the prayer that the respondents No.3 to 5 who are Revenue authorities may be directed to issue sale certificate of the lands of the petitioner bearing Survey No,95, '1 07 and 322, situated in Deh Patt Kandhi, Taluka l\4ehar, of District Dadu. Along-with this petition no document has been flled showing that petitioner is the owner of the said property and there is nothing on record either to indicate that the petitioner has approached the Revenue authorities at the first instance in accordance with law for getting the relief agitated by him in the instant petition. This being the position, we are of the view that this petition is not maintainable, accordingly the same is dismissed alongwith listed applications. The petitioner however may avail the remedy before proper forum in accordance with law JUDGE JUDGE & 0r
